seo.meta_description: Join Brent Peterson and Chris Sanchez on March 31 for a live masterclass on building a 90-Day Revenue Engine. Learn to fix your sales process, optimize your HubSpot stack, and unlock hidden revenue.
seo.og_description: Live webinar March 31: Stop the revenue leaks. Brent Peterson (Content Cucumber) and Chris Sanchez (Influential Passion) show you how to build a 90-Day Revenue Engine for companies doing $10M-$150M/yr.

form.subtitle: March 31 at 2:00 PM Eastern. 60 minutes of actionable strategy.
form.trust_text: Free to attend. Recording sent to all registrants.

thankyou.title: You're Registered!
thankyou.text: Check your inbox for confirmation details. We'll send a reminder before the live session on March 31 at 2:00 PM Eastern. See you there.

data.eyebrow: Live Webinar | March 31 at 2:00 PM ET
data.title: The 90-Day Revenue Engine: Building a Predictable Sales Machine for High-Ticket Brands
paragraphs: Your CRM is half-configured. Your reps are winging discovery calls. Your content and sales teams operate in separate universes. The result? Revenue walks out the door every single day.
Join Brent Peterson (Content Cucumber) and Chris Sanchez (Influential Passion) for a 60-minute masterclass on building a predictable revenue engine in 90 days. No theory. Just the mechanics.

data.alt: The 90-Day Revenue Engine webinar with Brent Peterson and Chris Sanchez

data.title: The Revenue Leaks You Can't See
data.subtitle: Most companies doing $10M-$150M/yr have at least three of these problems. They just don't know where to look.

items.title: The Frankenstack Problem
items.text: CRM, invoicing, e-commerce, content tools. If they don't talk to each other, you are losing money on every deal. Disconnected systems mean dropped leads and manual workarounds.

items.title: Sales Reps Without a Playbook
items.text: Your team is talented, but talent without process is inconsistent. No structured talk tracks, no objection handling framework, no daily rhythm. Results vary wildly rep to rep.

items.title: Dead Leads Collecting Dust
items.text: Thousands of past clients and prospects sit in your database doing nothing. No reactivation sequences. No win-back campaigns. That is a goldmine you are ignoring.

items.title: Content That Never Reaches Sales
items.text: Marketing creates case studies, whitepapers, and blog posts. Sales never uses them. The gap between content creation and sales enablement costs you closed deals.

items.title: No Visibility Into Pipeline Health
items.text: You check revenue at the end of the month and hope for the best. No real-time dashboards, no stage progression tracking, no leading indicators. You are flying blind.

data.title: Stop Patching. Start Building.
paragraphs: Most companies try to fix revenue problems one tool at a time. A new CRM feature here, a sales training session there. That is patching, not building.
The 90-Day Revenue Engine is a systematic approach that integrates your technology stack, sales process, and content strategy into a single machine that produces predictable revenue.

old_way.heading: Patching (What Most Do)
items: Buy tools, hope they work together
Train reps once, expect permanent results
Create content marketing never talks to sales about
Review pipeline monthly (too late to fix anything)
Spreadsheets and gut feeling for forecasting

new_way.heading: Building (What We'll Teach)
items: Unified HubSpot stack configured for your sales motion
Daily leadership rhythm: huddles, dashboards, follow-ups
Content-to-sales pipeline that arms reps with the right material
Real-time pipeline visibility with leading indicators

data.title: What You'll Walk Away With
data.subtitle: This is not a pitch session. It is a working session. Here is what you get.

steps.title: The HubSpot Stack Blueprint
steps.text: Brent breaks down how to properly configure HubSpot Sales Pro so your CRM actually drives revenue instead of collecting dust. Includes AI automation opportunities most companies miss.

steps.title: The Sales Leadership Rhythm
steps.text: Chris reveals the daily and weekly cadence that top-performing sales teams run. Huddles, call reviews, pipeline scrubs, and the management dashboard that ties it all together.

steps.title: The Quick Cash Campaign
steps.text: A step-by-step playbook for reactivating dead leads in your database. Most companies are sitting on immediate revenue they have already paid to acquire.

steps.title: Your 90-Day Action Plan
steps.text: Leave with a prioritized roadmap. Week 1 through Week 12. What to fix first, what to build second, and what to measure along the way.

data.title: Two Experts. One Revenue Engine.
paragraphs: Brent Peterson is the CEO of Content Cucumber, a HubSpot Solutions Partner specializing in content strategy and marketing automation for e-commerce companies. With 30+ years in the commerce space, Brent has helped hundreds of companies connect their content, technology, and sales operations.

Chris Sanchez is the founder of Influential Passion, a sales consulting firm that builds high-performing sales teams. Chris specializes in sales coaching, process optimization, and the leadership rhythms that turn average teams into quota-crushing machines.

items.question: When is the webinar?
items.answer: March 31, 2026 at 2:00 PM Eastern. The session runs approximately 60 minutes: 25 minutes from Brent on HubSpot and AI automation, 25 minutes from Chris on sales coaching and process, plus 10 minutes of live Q&A.

items.question: Is this free?
items.answer: Yes, completely free. Register and attend live, or watch the recording afterward. We will send the replay link to all registrants.

items.question: Who is this for?
items.answer: Companies doing $10M to $150M+ per year with a sales team of 3-10+ reps. Whether you are on HubSpot, considering it, or using a competitor like Salesforce or Pipedrive, the strategies apply. If you have a sales team and revenue feels unpredictable, this session is for you.

items.question: Will there be a recording?
items.answer: Yes. Everyone who registers will receive the recording, whether or not you attend live. We recommend attending live for the Q&A portion.

items.question: What are the free audits mentioned?
items.answer: Two separate offers. Brent's team runs a free automated HubSpot portal audit that scans your Marketing, Sales, and Service Hubs and delivers a prioritized PDF report. Chris offers a free sales team audit where he reviews your sales scripts, call recordings, pipeline structure, and process gaps. Both are no-obligation.

items.question: I'm not on HubSpot. Is this still relevant?
items.answer: Absolutely. The sales process optimization, leadership rhythms, and revenue engine framework apply regardless of your CRM. Chris's sales coaching content is platform-agnostic. Brent's HubSpot section will show you what a properly configured CRM looks like if you are evaluating options.

data.title: Stop the Revenue Leaks. Build the Engine.
data.text: Register now for the free live webinar on March 31. Walk away with a 90-day action plan to fix your sales process, optimize your tech stack, and unlock the revenue already hiding in your pipeline.
